system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_quytrinh_print","body":"CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_QUYTRINH_PRINT]
(
	@MADDH NVARCHAR(MAX),
	@MASP NVARCHAR(MAX),
	@SOLUONG INT,
	@XUONG NVARCHAR(100) = '',
	@MACT NVARCHAR(max) = '%'
)
AS

SELECT @MADDH as maddh
	, a.masp 
	, a.mact
	, a.stt
	, a.chitiet
     , dbo.GetNameBySTT( @MASP, LEFT(a.stt, 1) ) AS cumchitiet
	, a.nguyenlieu
	, dayy_tc, rong_tc, dai_tc 
	, soluong_tc
	, (soluong_tc * @SOLUONG) soluong_can
	, (m3_tc * @SOLUONG) as m3_tc
	, B.STT AS stt_rout
	, b.ThongTin, b.May, b.LuuY
	, b.id_rout
	, ghichu
	, a.hinhanh
INTO #TMP
FROM tr_dinhmuc_govan a
	LEFT JOIN tr_luutrinh_sanxuat b ON A.mact = B.MaCT AND b.active = 1
WHERE A.masp = @MASP
	AND hoanthanh = 1
	AND ISNULL(A.mact, '') <> '000'
	AND ISNULL(A.nguyenlieu, '') NOT IN ('', '0')
	AND CASE 
			WHEN @MACT = '%' THEN @MACT ELSE A.mact
		END IN (SELECT dbo.TRIM([value]) FROM dbo.fn_Split(@MACT,','))
--ORDER BY a.stt, B.Xuong, b.STT

IF @XUONG = ''
BEGIN
	SELECT A.*, B.BoPhan, B.TenQuyTrinh, B.ToNhom
	FROM #TMP A LEFT JOIN tr_quytrinh_sanxuat B
		ON A.id_rout = B.id
	WHERE CASE 
				WHEN @MACT = '%' THEN @MACT
				ELSE A.mact
			 END IN (SELECT dbo.TRIM([value]) FROM dbo.fn_Split(@MACT,','))
          --A.mact like @MACT
	ORDER BY A.stt, 
		CASE 
			WHEN B.BoPhan = N'Định Phôi' THEN 'A' 
			WHEN B.BoPhan = N'Định Hình' THEN 'B' 
		END, A.stt_rout
END
ELSE
BEGIN
	SELECT A.*, B.BoPhan, B.TenQuyTrinh, B.ToNhom
	FROM #TMP A LEFT JOIN tr_quytrinh_sanxuat B
		ON A.id_rout = B.id
	WHERE B.BoPhan = @XUONG 
          --AND A.mact like @MACT
          AND CASE 
				WHEN @MACT = '%' THEN @MACT
				ELSE A.mact
			 END IN (SELECT dbo.TRIM([value]) FROM dbo.fn_Split(@MACT,','))
	ORDER BY A.stt, 
		CASE 
			WHEN B.BoPhan = N'Định Phôi' THEN 'A' 
			WHEN B.BoPhan = N'Định Hình' THEN 'B' 
		END, A.stt_rout
END

DROP TABLE #TMP","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.fn_split","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_quytrinh_sanxuat"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
